title: CozmoUI
description:
An unofficial extended resource pack for CozyUI+. 
CozyUI+的非官方拓展资源包。
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19256a9fa1da51bb3ce90b2f94cb27b42149cf37.png)

### **⚠️ WARNING!!! 注意！⚠️**
This resource pack is still in progress, and some details may not be handled very well. Please forgive!😥\
本资源包仍在制作中，部分细节可能处理不佳，还请见谅！😥

### **🖊️  PACK DESCRIPTION 资源包描述 🖊️**

This resource pack covers CozyUI+ into more mods, such as The Twilight Forest, The Aether, Touhou Little Maid and so on.\
本资源包为 CozyUI+ 添加了更多模组的覆盖，如暮色森林、天境、车万女仆等模组。

Please download [CozyUI+](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cozyui-plus) first and load this pack above CozyUI+ to work correctly.\
请先下载 [CozyUI+](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cozyui-plus) 资源包，然后将此资源包加载在 CozyUI+ 之上以正常显示。
![Load the CozmoUI pack above CozyUI+.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/056a4161283b4fecdc1acc753e55921d14e69b6f.png)\
**This pack currently only supports Minecraft 1.20.1.\
本资源包目前仅支持 Minecraft 1.20.1版本。**

### **⭐ COVERED MODS 覆盖模组 ⭐**

| Mod Name 模组名称             | Mod Version 模组版本               | Home Page Link 模组链接              | Pack Version 包版本           |
|:---------------------:|:---------------------:|:---------------------:|:---------------------:|
| Alex's Mobs   Alex的生物           | 1.22.9               | [🔗CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-mobs)             | alpha 0.1           |
| Maid Addition 女仆附属           | 1.1.4-beta              | [🔗CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/maidaddition)              | alpha 0.1           |
| The Aether 天境           | 1.5.2              | [🔗CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aether)              | alpha 0.1           |
| The Twilight Forest 暮色森林| 4.3.2508 | [🔗CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest)  | alpha 0.1           |
| Touhou Little Maid 车万女仆| 1.4.6 | [🔗CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/touhou-little-maid)  | alpha 0.1           |~~~~
### **😎 SPECIAL THANKS 鸣谢 😎**
- Fogg05: the original creator of [CozyUI+](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cozyui-plus), RIP 2025\
零雾05：CozyUI+原作者，RIP 2025

- WhatDamon: the creator of [CozyUI Ex](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cozyui-ex)\
WhatDamon：CozyUI Ex作者

- TartaricAcid: the creator of [Touhou Little Maid](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/touhou-little-maid)\
酒石酸菌：车万女仆模组作者

- IBM: providing the [Plex Sans font](https://github.com/IBM/plex)\
IBM：提供 Plex Sans 字体

- MaokenFont: providing the [Frex Sans font](https://github.com/maoken-fonts/frex-sans)\
猫啃字体：提供械黑字体

- Microsoft: providing the [Fluent Emoji](https://github.com/microsoft/fluentui-emoji)\
微软：提供 Fluent Emoji 颜文字素材
